expectations.evidence: Uses correct variable names PUSHOVER_USER_KEY and PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN
Uses test-user-key and test-app-token as provided

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Puts credentials directly in ~/.zshrc which may be committed to dotfiles repos. Only warns 'Don't commit your .zshrc with credentials visible' but still puts them there

eval_feedback.overall: Without-skill run gets variable names right (common convention) but writes to wrong file
